title: Classify and handle TUI/SQLite legacy references — Surface Area Map
summary: Lane CT-008 targets two legacy domains: (1) the 'tui' member of PluginKind in plugin/shared.ts and all its consumers, (2) the sqlite() function in projectors-next.ts (now renamed to project(), but SQLiteTransactionOptions and snapshot refs remain). Key finding: the sqlite→project rename has already been executed by a concurrent lane — only SQLiteTransactionOptions deprecation and the snapshot 'sqlite3' string remain as active cleanup targets for the SQLite side. The TUI side is larger: PluginKind still carries 'tui' as a union member with @deprecated JSDoc, ~51 test files reference tui concepts, and 35+ production lines in plugin/shared.ts, install.ts, config.ts, and loader.ts handle tui as a plugin kind.

1_plugin_kind_tui_definition.deprecated_jsdoc: /** @deprecated "tui" kind is legacy — use "server" or "desktop" instead. Kept for backward compatibility with existing plugin install/detection logic. */
1_plugin_kind_tui_definition.note: No dot-notation access like PluginKind.tui exists — all consumers use bare string literal "tui"

2_projectors_next_sqlite_function.definition: function project(db: Database.TxOrDb, sessionID: SessionID): SessionMessageUpdater.Adapter<void>
2_projectors_next_sqlite_function.status: RENAMED (by concurrent lane) — no 'sqlite' references remain in this file
2_projectors_next_sqlite_function.callers_of_sqlite: NONE — all references renamed to project()

3_sqlite_transaction_options.deprecated_jsdoc: /** @deprecated Use PostgresTransactionOptions instead. SQLite transaction behavior is legacy. */
3_sqlite_transaction_options.union: export type TransactionOptions = | SQLiteTransactionOptions | PostgresTransactionOptions | { behavior?: ... }
3_sqlite_transaction_options.imports_by_other_files: NONE — only used internally within adapter.ts (lines 53, 65, 123, 125, 132)
related_sqlite_refs_in_adapter: line 387: comment '// ── Default layer (selects SQLite or Postgres)'

4_snapshot_sqlite3_reference.content: opencode db [query]     open an interactive sqlite3 shell or run a query                 [default]
4_snapshot_sqlite3_reference.note: This is a CLI help-text snapshot. The 'sqlite3' string in the 'opencode db' command description would need to change if the db command help text is updated to say 'Postgres' instead of 'sqlite3'.

5_upgrade_opentui_script.purpose: Upgrades @opentui/core, @opentui/keymap, @opentui/solid package versions across all package.json files and bun.lock
5_upgrade_opentui_script.note: This script upgrades the opentui (SolidJS TUI framework) packages — distinct from the 'tui' PluginKind concept but shares the 'tui'/opentui naming space.

6_tui_plugin_source_files.dedicated_tui_files: NONE — no files with 'tui' in filename under src/plugin/

files_referencing_tui_kind.role: Defines PluginKind type with 'tui' member; reads tui export from plugin manifest; validates tui export type
Local Kind type ('server' | 'tui'); extracts tui export target; pushes tui targets; patchName() maps kind→'tui'
Comments only — 'server/tui entrypoint', 'tui plugin package that has no code entrypoint'

additional_production_references.role: Legacy config migration: detects 'tui' key in copy, deletes copy.tui, warns about deprecation

other_test_files_referencing_tui: test/plugin/loader-shared.test.ts (tui in test names and kind params)

8_other_plugin_kind_tui_references.dot_notation_references: NONE — PluginKind is a string literal union, not an enum. No PluginKind.tui or PluginKind.Tui patterns exist.

9_sqlite_callers_across_codebase.callers_of_sqlite_from_projectors_next: NONE — function renamed to project(), all call sites updated
sqlite_references_in_sessions: session/projectors.ts:18 — SQLITE_CONSTRAINT_FOREIGNKEY error code check (legacy Drizzle SQLite error code)

smoking_guns.finding: projectors-next.ts sqlite→project rename already executed by concurrent lane
smoking_guns.detail: The function at line 29 was sqlite() in earlier grep but is now project(). Call site at line 119 also updated. CT-008 should check if this lane's work is already done or if there are remaining references elsewhere.

smoking_guns.finding: PluginKind still carries 'tui' as union member despite @deprecated JSDoc
smoking_guns.detail: 51 test files, 3 production files, and ~35+ lines of production code still handle 'tui' as a first-class plugin kind. The @deprecated JSDoc (line 37) is a soft signal — removal requires updating all consumers.

smoking_guns.finding: SQLiteTransactionOptions is @deprecated but still exported and used internally
smoking_guns.detail: Defined at adapter.ts:53-56 with deprecation JSDoc. Used at lines 123-132 in the local SQLite adapter. Part of TransactionOptions union (line 65). Namespace re-export at line 415 makes it available externally. No external consumers found.

smoking_guns.finding: Snapshot file contains 'sqlite3' in CLI help text for 'opencode db' command
smoking_guns.detail: help-snapshots.test.ts.snap:399: 'open an interactive sqlite3 shell or run a query'. If the db backend is now Postgres-only, this help text is misleading.

smoking_guns.finding: projectors.ts uses SQLITE_CONSTRAINT_FOREIGNKEY error code (Drizzle SQLite-specific)
smoking_guns.detail: At line 18: foreign() checks err.code === 'SQLITE_CONSTRAINT_FOREIGNKEY'. This is a Drizzle SQLite error code that won't match Postgres errors. Should be updated to Postgres error codes.

smoking_guns.finding: opentui upgrade script and package dependencies are separate from PluginKind.tui
smoking_guns.detail: The opentui ecosystem (@opentui/core, keymap, solid) is the SolidJS TUI rendering framework — distinct from the 'tui' PluginKind concept. The upgrade-opentui.ts script manages framework version bumps. These are not legacy and should not be removed.

clearly_legacy_and_removable: SQLiteTransactionOptions type (adapter.ts:53-56) — only used internally, already @deprecated
SQLITE_CONSTRAINT_FOREIGNKEY error code check (projectors.ts:18) — should use Postgres error codes
legacy_but_with_active_consumers: PluginKind 'tui' member (shared.ts:38) — 51 test files + 3 production files consume this
install.ts tui target logic (lines 156-162, 340-342) — active plugin install path
config.ts tui migration logic (lines 66,70) — still guards against legacy config keys
not_legacy_do_not_touch: opentui framework (@opentui/* packages) — active SolidJS TUI rendering framework
upgrade-opentui.ts script — active version management tool
test/cli/tui/ and test/cli/cmd/tui/ test directories — active TUI application tests
